mapper.select:
select u.user_id as id, u.user_name as username, u.nick_name as display_name, u.password as password, u.status as status, e.role, e.office_code, e.office_name, case when u.status = '0' and e.enabled = 1 then 1 else 0 end as enabled
order by u.user_id asc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select u.user_id as id, u.user_name as username, u.nick_name as display_name, u.password as password, u.status as status, e.role, e.office_code, e.office_name, case when u.status = '0' and e.enabled = 1 then 1 else 0 end as enabled from sys_user u inner join cb_account_extension e on e.user_id = u.user_id where u.user_id = #{userId} and u.del_flag = '0'
select user_id from sys_user where user_name = #{username} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user(user_name, nick_name, password, status, del_flag, create_time) values(#{username}, #{displayName}, #{password}, #{status}, '0', sysdate())
mapper.update: update sys_user set nick_name = #{displayName}, status = #{status}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{id}
update sys_user set password = #{password}, pwd_update_date = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into cb_account_extension(id, user_id, role, office_code, office_name, enabled, created_at, updated_at) values(#{id}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{officeCode}, #{officeName}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update cb_account_extension set role = #{role}, office_code = #{officeCode}, office_name = #{officeName}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where user_id = #{userId}
